metaTitle: Understanding Khand Jaati  - Yogesh Samsi International Masterclass
metaDescription: This masterclass offers a deep, foundational exploration into the rhythmic aesthetics of Khand Jaati. This is an opportunity to participate in an intensive workshop for talented young Tabla students by the world renowned Tabla player Yogesh Samsi, disciple of the late Ustad Allarakha and will be held on Saturday 27th June & Sunday 28th June 2026 via Zoom (Video conferencing & Webinar Platform).
title: Understanding Khand Jaati
heroImageAlt: Yogesh Samsi sitting with his tabla
